{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Emperor's spikes
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]] left seven giant iron spikes beneath the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
